media:group/media:description: 🔗 Join AI Studio to easily & quickly build AI agents & automations:: https://www.skool.com/cac-ai-studio

🔗If you want an automation/agent built in your business - book a call: 
https://calendly.com/alireza-chegini/discovery-call

🚀 Want to build your first AI agent without writing a single line of code? In this step-by-step beginner tutorial, I show you exactly how to create, test, and manage your very first AI agent using Azure AI Foundry — in less than 20 minutes!

✅ What you’ll learn in this video:
 • How to set up an Azure AI Foundry account
 • How to create a new agent from scratch
 • How to give your agent instructions and personality
 • How to add private knowledge (PDF upload & RAG-style Q&A)
 • How to monitor your agent’s performance
 • How to clean up your resources and avoid surprise Azure bills

00:00 - What You’ll Learn
00:21 - Azure AI Foundry Introduction 
00:58 - Setting Up Azure AI Foundry
01:44 - Creating a New AI Agent Project
04:35 - Deploying Your First Agent
05:04 - Customizing Agent Behavior & Settings
07:27 - Testing Your Agent Live
09:54 - Writing Agent Instructions
11:40 - Adding Knowledge (PDF Upload for RAG)
13:08 - Talking to Your Document (PDF Q&A)
14:37 - Monitoring & Observability Dashboard
17:11 - Cleaning Up Your Azure Resources
20:03 - Final Recap & Next Steps

🙏 Buy me a coffee ☕ : https://coff.ee/alirezachegini

 🔗 Azure AI Foundry: https://ai.azure.com/
